---
title: "Teaching | Assistant Professor of Accounting"
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta
          name="description"
          content="Teaching page for an Assistant Professor of Accounting."
        />
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero__content}
<p class="eyebrow">Teaching</p>

# Assistant Professor of Accounting

::: {.lead}
This site is dedicated to teaching materials, including course details and downloadable slides created in Quarto and rendered to HTML.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.container}
::: {.card}
## Current Courses

- Financial Accounting
- Managerial Accounting
- Seminar in Accounting Research
:::

::: {.card}
## Course Slides

Slides are authored with Quarto markdown and shared as HTML pages.

- [Financial Accounting: Week 1 Slides](slides/financial-accounting-week-1.html)
- [Managerial Accounting: Cost Behavior Slides](slides/managerial-accounting-cost-behavior.html)
- [Research Seminar: Methods Overview](slides/research-seminar-methods-overview.html)
:::

::: {.card}
## Contact

For course-related questions, please contact me through the university email listed in the course syllabus.
:::
:::
